analysis.summary: The request was to enable C# Nullable Reference Types (NRT) in the SkiaSharp.Views.Maui.Core project. Code investigation shows <Nullable>Enable</Nullable> is already present in the project file, meaning this enhancement has been implemented since the issue was filed in May 2022.
